query:
SELECT id, blockId, subjectSlug, title, submissionType, LEFT(COALESCE(contentText,''), 60) AS preview, reviewStatus, adultNotes, submittedAt
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
ORDER BY submittedAt DESC
LIMIT 8;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, blockId, subjectSlug, title, submissionType, LEFT(COALESCE(contentText,''), 60) AS preview, reviewStatus, adultNotes, submittedAt
FROM assignmentSubmissions
WHERE adultNotes LIKE '%archived%'
ORDER BY submittedAt DESC
LIMIT 8;
